name: Run Full CRISPR Workflow
description: Runs a full CRISPR workflow for the explicit query provided: resolves a target sequence from raw DNA, local resource, or gene name plus organism; runs Cas-system selection; designs guides for the selected vector's nuclease system; selects one protospacer; designs cloning oligos for a chosen vector; creates a sequence_build construction file; and validates the resulting construction inputs. Do not infer or silently choose a gene from prior disease, phenotype, pathway, ontology, or multi-gene results. If a gene was selected by an upstream search, pass the original request as source_query; the tool will ask the user to confirm the selected gene unless gene_confirmed=true.

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: Explicit raw DNA sequence, local resource name, or gene symbol to resolve. Required; do not reuse a previous gene unless the user explicitly selected it.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Organism name used when query must be fetched from NCBI. Required for gene-symbol queries; raw DNA and local resources do not require it.

inputs.name: vector
inputs.description: Vector preset name to use for cloning oligo design. Use px330 for mammalian cells, pml104 or pml107 for S. cerevisiae (yeast), pcrispr for E. coli, pdr274 for zebrafish, or pdd162 for C. elegans. If omitted, the tool returns needs_user_input with organism-appropriate recommendations.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Optional final construct name to include in construction inputs.

inputs.name: guide_index
inputs.description: Zero-based guide index to select from the designed guide list for the selected vector's nuclease system. Default: 0.

inputs.name: validate_strict
inputs.description: Whether validation should raise on biological validation failures. Default: false.

inputs.name: force_vector
inputs.description: If true, continue with provided vector. Whether to force the use of the vector-specified CRISPR system even if the CasSelector recommends a different system. Default: false.

inputs.name: confirmed
inputs.description: If true, continue after sequence fetch, Cas-system selection, vector compatibility check, and the user confirmation step. Default: false.

inputs.name: source_query
inputs.description: Optional original natural-language disease, phenotype, pathway, ontology, or multi-gene request that led an upstream tool to select query. If supplied and different from query, the workflow pauses for gene confirmation before fetching sequence.

inputs.name: gene_confirmed
inputs.description: Set true only after the user explicitly confirms that the upstream-selected query gene is the desired target. Direct user-provided gene names do not require this field.

outputs.description: A full workflow result containing workflow_trace, sequence_info, guides, selected_guide, cloning, construction_file_inputs, construction, and validation. workflow_trace summarizes each internal tool-equivalent step in order, with input summaries and output summaries.

examples.notes: For multi-gene upstream results, run once per selected gene or ask the user which gene to use.

input.source_query: genes in Homo sapiens associated with lung cancer

examples.notes: Use source_query for any gene selected from an upstream disease, phenotype, pathway, ontology, or gene-list search, even if only one candidate gene was returned.
